title: Simola Hillclimb cars on display in Hedge Street
description: KNYSNA NEWS & VIDEO - The eyes of the...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Video

KNYSNA NEWS & VIDEO - The eyes of the motorsport fans will turn to Knysna this weekend, as the 2024 Knysna Speed Festival rolls into the town.


> Today presents a perfect opportunity for fans to get up close and personal with the cars and drivers that will do battle up Simola Hill, with a display and scrutineering happening in Hedge street, followed by a parade that departs from the Waterfront at 14:45.


The racing action gets underway on Simola Hill tomorrow, with the first official practice at 08:00 on Friday morning.

PHOTO GALLERY: Simola Hillclimb 2024 cars on display


> VIDEO: Jeff Ayliffe


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
